zh.Sible Hedingham, Essex, England: 英國艾可希布爾 丁加姆
zh.lifeSummary: 當Richard de Praers於大約1255年出生在英國艾可希布爾 丁加姆時，他的父親Sir Randle de Praers of Barthomley, Knight21歲，母親Sybil Hedington17歲。他和Johanna Crewe至少有5個兒子。他去世於1318年9月在英國爾巴堂姆利享年64歲。

zh-hans.Sible Hedingham, Essex, England: 英国艾可希布爾 丁加姆
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Richard de Praers于大约1255年出生在英国艾可希布爾 丁加姆时，他的父亲Sir Randle de Praers of Barthomley, Knight21岁，母亲Sybil Hedington17岁。他和Johanna Crewe至少有5个儿子。他去世于1318年9月在英国爾巴堂姆利享年64岁。

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

en.lifeSummary: When Richard de Praers was born about 1255, in Sible Hedingham, Essex, England, his father, Sir Randle de Praers of Barthomley, Knight, was 21 and his mother, Sybil Hedington, was 17. He had at least 5 sons with Johanna Crewe. He died in September 1318, in Barthomley, Cheshire, England, at the age of 64.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Richard de Praers est né environ 1255, à Sible Hedingham, Essex, Angleterre, son père, Sir Randle de Praers of Barthomley, Knight, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Sybil Hedington, avait 17 ans. Il a eu au moins 5 fils avec Johanna Crewe. Il est décédé en septembre 1318, à Barthomley, Cheshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 64 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Richard de Praers um 1255 in Sible Hedingham, Essex, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Randle de Praers of Barthomley, Knight 21 und seine Mutter Sybil Hedington 17. Er hatte mit Johanna Crewe mindestens 5 Söhne. Er starb im September 1318 im Alter von 64 Jahren in Barthomley, Cheshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Richard de Praers è nato il circa 1255 nel Sible Hedingham, Essex, England, il suo padre, Sir Randle de Praers of Barthomley, Knight, aveva 21 anni e il suo madre, Sybil Hedington, aveva 17 anni. Lui avuto almeno 5 figli con Johanna Crewe. Morì nel settembre 1318, nel Barthomley, Cheshire, England, all'età di 64 anni.

ja.Sible Hedingham, Essex, England: イギリスエセックスシブル ヘディンガム
ja.lifeSummary: Richard de Praersが約1255年にイギリスエセックスシブル ヘディンガムで生まれた時，父Sir Randle de Praers of Barthomley, Knightは21歳，母Sybil Hedingtonは17歳であった。彼はJohanna Creweとの間に少なくとも5人の息子をもうけた。彼は1318年9月にイギリスチェシュアイアバーソムリーで64歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Richard de Praers(이)가 대략 1255년 영국 에세스 시블일 헤딩함에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Randle de Praers of Barthomley, Knight(은)는 21세였고, 그의 어머니 Sybil Hedington(은)는 17세였다. 그는 Johanna Crewe(와)과 적어도 다섯 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1318년 9월 영국 체실르 바톰리에서 64세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.Dutton, Cheshire, England: Dutton, Legeceasterscir, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Richard de Praers nasceu aproximadamente 1255, em Sible Hedingham, Essex, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Randle de Praers of Barthomley, Knight, tinha 21 anos e sua mãe, Sybil Hedington, tinha 17 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 5 filhos com Johanna Crewe. Ele faleceu em setembro de 1318, em Barthomley, Cheshire, Inglaterra, com 64 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Richard de Praers родился около 1255 г. в местности сибл хедингхам, эссекс, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Randle de Praers of Barthomley, Knight было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Sybil Hedington, 17. У него было по крайней мере 5 сыновей от Johanna Crewe. Он умер сентябрь 1318 г. в местности бартомли, чешир, Англия в возрасте 64 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Richard de Praers nació aproximadamente 1255, en Sible Hedingham, Essex, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Randle de Praers of Barthomley, Knight, tenía 21 años y su mamá, Sybil Hedington, tenía 17 años. Tuvo por lo menos 5 hijos con Johanna Crewe. Murió en septiembre de 1318, en Barthomley, Cheshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 64 años.
